name: Skeleton
description: Adaptive design system for Tailwind CSS with turnkey components built on Zag.js

description.value: Adaptive design system for Tailwind CSS with turnkey components built on Zag.js

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - v4.8.0 released December 12, 2025; regular releases; 161 contributors

framework.comment: Primary Svelte support with React package; Vue and Solid.js planned for future; core design system is framework-agnostic Tailwind CSS

styling-approach.comment: Built entirely on Tailwind CSS; CSS custom properties enable theme integration into Tailwind utilities

component-model.comment: Styled components with ready-to-use visuals built on Tailwind; overlay components (Dialog, Popover, Tooltip) shipped headless for full styling control in v4

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (37.1% of codebase); provides IntelliSense feedback and type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with SvelteKit which provides SSR by default; standard setup without special SSR configuration

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - React package available but Skeleton is primarily Svelte-focused; React SSR supported but RSC not documented

design-system.comment: Custom adaptive design system; provides pre-built themes (Cerberus, Catppuccin, Crimson, Mint, Rose, Wintry, 16+ others) and theme generator tool

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode via data-mode attribute; system preference detection; stored in localStorage

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via CSS custom properties; theme generator tool; multiple simultaneous themes with on-demand switching

css-variables.comment: Extensive CSS custom properties for colors, fonts, spacing; variables like --color-surface-50-950, --color-green-500

design-tokens.comment: Token-based approach for colors, spacing, typography; adaptive theming through CSS variables

rtl-support.comment: RTL support via Zag.js integration which provides standardized i18n features

component-count.comment: 40+ framework components (Accordion, Avatar, Combobox, Date Picker, Dialog, File Upload, Listbox, Menu, Modal, etc.) plus 8 Tailwind components (Badges, Buttons, Cards, Chips, Dividers, Forms, Placeholders, Tables)

text-input.comment: Forms and Inputs as Tailwind component; native input styling with Tailwind classes

select.comment: Listbox component for selection interface; supports flat lists, groups, and search

combobox.comment: Combobox component with search/filter; supports custom filter with Fuse.js integration

checkbox.comment: Included in Forms Tailwind component; native checkbox with Tailwind styling

radio.comment: Included in Forms Tailwind component; native radio with Tailwind styling

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for boolean toggle values

number-input.comment: No dedicated number input component; use native input type=number with Forms styling

tag-input.comment: Tags Input component for multiple tags/tokens with add/remove

date-picker.comment: Date Picker component with flexible calendar; supports inline or input-paired modes

date-range-picker.comment: Date Picker available but date range selection not explicitly documented

file-upload.comment: File Upload component; supports Provider pattern for custom features like Clear button

dropzone.comment: File Upload component includes drag-and-drop functionality

rating-input.comment: Rating Group component for star ratings or similar input

input-groups.comment: No dedicated input group component; compose with Tailwind utility classes

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown component; compose with Combobox or Popover

button-groups.comment: Segmented Control and Toggle Group components for grouped button behavior

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button component; compose with Button and Menu

table.comment: Tables as Tailwind component with styling utilities

data-table.comment: Basic table styling only; no advanced data table with sorting, filtering, pagination built-in

tree-view.comment: Tree View component with hierarchical navigation, single/multiple selection, and lazy loading support

list-view.comment: Listbox component provides styled list interface

avatar.comment: Avatar framework component with image and fallback support

calendar.comment: Date Picker includes calendar display; can be used inline

alert.comment: No dedicated alert/banner component; use Toast for notifications

toast-notification.comment: Toast component for temporary popup notifications

progress-bar.comment: Progress - Linear component for determinate progress

progress-circle.comment: Progress - Circular component with multiple formats via native Intl API

spinner-loader.comment: No dedicated spinner/loader; progress components can be used for loading states

skeleton.comment: Placeholders as Tailwind component for loading states

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component for centered overlay dialogs; shipped headless in v4 for full styling control

drawer-sheet.comment: Floating Panel (beta) component for slide-in panels

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to trigger; headless in v4

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for hover hints; headless in v4

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component; can compose with Combobox and Dialog

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

pagination.comment: Pagination component for page navigation controls

stepper.comment: Steps (beta) component for multi-step process indicator and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation component redesigned in v4 with bottom bar, rail, and sidebar layouts with groups and labels

bottom-navigation.comment: Navigation component supports bottom bar layout

grid.comment: Use Tailwind CSS grid utilities directly

stack.comment: Use Tailwind CSS flex utilities directly

container.comment: Use Tailwind CSS container class directly

aspect-ratio.comment: Use Tailwind CSS aspect-ratio utilities directly

collapsible.comment: Collapsible component (new in v4) for accordion-style toggles; also Accordion component

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

code-editors.comment: Code Block integration with syntax highlighting; integrations mentioned with Bits UI, Melt UI, Radix UI

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in or official chart library integration

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; uses native form handling with Tailwind styling

animation-libraries.comment: Custom animation support through extensible markup; components support any animation system

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons; use any icon library with Tailwind; documentation mentions Iconography as design element

date-libraries.comment: Date Picker uses native Date API; no external date library dependency required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns via Zag.js foundation which provides standardized accessibility

keyboard-navigation.comment: Keyboard navigation outlines standard across all components in v4; full keyboard support via Zag.js

screen-reader-tested.comment: Accessibility has been top priority since day one; Zag.js provides battle-tested a11y

focus-management.comment: Proper focus management via Zag.js; overlay components handle focus trapping

wcag-level.comment: No explicit WCAG compliance level documented; Zag.js provides accessibility foundation

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - Built on Zag.js with standardized a11y and i18n; keyboard navigation standard across all components; accessibility is stated top priority

bundle-size-full.comment: Package size 480kB on npm; actual bundle size depends on tree-shaking and Tailwind CSS purging

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable; Tailwind-based approach means most 'styles' are utility classes purged at build time

tree-shakeable.comment: Components can be imported individually; Tailwind CSS purges unused utilities

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for interactive components (Zag.js state machines)

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with API reference, examples, and guides; theme generator tool; migration guides available

storybook.comment: No official public Storybook; playgrounds available in monorepo

figma-kit.comment: Official Figma UI Kit v3 available at skeleton.dev/figma; created by community contributors in partnership with Skeleton Labs; includes Figma plugin for theme color palette import

cli-generator.comment: CLI support for migration; project setup via Svelte CLI with Skeleton configuration

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 15,603 weekly downloads for @skeletonlabs/skeleton-svelte as of December 2025

commercial-support.comment: MIT licensed open source; community support via Discord (2k+ members); no paid enterprise tier

style-override.comment: Standardized class attribute across all components in v4; CSS variables for theming; Tailwind utility classes for customization

compound-components.comment: Composed pattern in v4 for fine-grained control over component trees; extensible markup enabling structural HTML modifications

render-props.comment: Svelte uses slots pattern rather than render props

slots.comment: Svelte native slots for content injection; component composition pattern

unstyled-mode.comment: Overlay components (Combobox, Dialog, Popover, Tooltip) shipped headless in v4 for full styling control
